recipes.title: Traditional European Moussaka
recipes.description: A classic recipe for juicy layered minced meat and potato moussaka with a fluffy yogurt topping.
recipes.detailedDescription: Sauté the chopped onion, carrots, and minced meat. Mix with diced potatoes and rich seasoning. Bake in the oven, and cover with a traditional egg-and-yogurt topping during the last 10 minutes until golden brown.

recipes.title: Homemade Ultimate Chocolate Cake
recipes.description: A rich, moist, and indulgent chocolate cake layered with ganache, perfect for birthdays.
recipes.detailedDescription: Bake the sponge layers from scratch. Whip up a velvety cream frosting using butter and rich dark chocolate. Assemble by syruping the cake layers, then refrigerate for at least 4 hours before slicing.

recipes.title: Authentic Roman Pasta Carbonara
recipes.description: A true Italian classic boasting a creamy emulsion of eggs, pecorino cheese, and crispy guanciale.
recipes.detailedDescription: Boil the pasta until perfectly al dente. Crisp up the pancetta in a pan. Whisk egg yolks with grated Pecorino. Combine everything off the heat, adding starchy pasta water to create a rich, silky sauce without cream.

recipes.title: Fresh Avocado & Quinoa Salad
recipes.description: A nutrient-dense, refreshing dietary salad packed with clean plant proteins and healthy fats.
recipes.detailedDescription: Boil the quinoa and let it cool completely. Toss with freshly diced cucumbers, ripe avocados, and cherry tomatoes. Drizzle generously with an organic lemon and extra virgin olive oil vinaigrette.

recipes.title: Classic Chicken Tikka Masala
recipes.description: Tender pieces of marinated grilled chicken smothered in a creamy, aromatic spiced tomato sauce.
recipes.detailedDescription: Marinate the chicken cubes in a spiced yogurt blend. Sear them on high heat, then simmer them gently inside a rich gravy composed of tomato purée, fragrant ginger-garlic paste, and heavy whipping cream.

recipes.title: Quick Student Egg Scramble
recipes.description: An incredibly cheap, high-protein meal made in under twenty minutes using pantry staples.
recipes.detailedDescription: Sauté finely chopped onions and pickled red peppers in a skillet. Fold in crumbled feta cheese, followed by well-beaten eggs. Scramble continuously over medium heat until fluffy and fully cooked.

recipes.title: Fluffy Vegan Banana Pancakes
recipes.description: Delightful breakfast pancakes prepared without dairy or eggs, naturally sweetened with ripe bananas.
recipes.detailedDescription: Blend all ingredients together until a smooth, velvety batter forms. Pour onto a lightly oiled, hot non-stick griddle pan. Cook for 2 minutes on each side. Serve warm with organic maple syrup.

recipes.title: Gourmet Homemade Beef Burger
recipes.description: A juicy charbroiled beef patty nestled inside a toasted brioche bun with cheddar and bacon.
recipes.detailedDescription: Shape premium ground beef into thick patties and sear on a cast-iron skillet. Melt sharp cheddar on top. Crisp the bacon, toast your brioche buns, and stack high with pickles and custom secret burger sauce.

recipes.title: Velvety Roasted Pumpkin Soup
recipes.description: A smooth, warming autumn soup made from oven-roasted butternut squash, finished with heavy cream.
recipes.detailedDescription: Boil roasted butternut squash pieces along with potatoes and carrots in vegetable broth. Puree with an immersion blender until completely silky, incorporate cooking cream, season with freshly grated nutmeg, and serve with pumpkin seeds.

recipes.title: Crispy Golden Chicken Tenders
recipes.description: Super crunchy fried chicken breast strips double-coated in seasoned cornflakes crumbs.
recipes.detailedDescription: Slice chicken fillets into even strips and toss with spices. Dredge them in all-purpose flour, dip into beaten eggs, and press firmly into crushed crunchy cornflakes. Deep fry until golden and crispy.
